title: Amiibo API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the AmiiboAPI responses

AmiiboRelease.title: Amiibo Release Dates
AmiiboRelease.description: Regional release dates for an Amiibo figure.

au.description: Release date in Australia (YYYY-MM-DD) or null.

eu.description: Release date in Europe (YYYY-MM-DD) or null.

jp.description: Release date in Japan (YYYY-MM-DD) or null.

na.description: Release date in North America (YYYY-MM-DD) or null.

GameEntry.title: Game Entry
GameEntry.description: A game compatible with the Amiibo on a given platform.

gameID.description: List of title IDs for this game on the platform.

examples: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

GameUsageEntry.title: Game Usage Entry
GameUsageEntry.description: A game compatible with the Amiibo including usage details.

gameID.description: List of title IDs for this game on the platform.

usage.description: List of usage descriptions for this Amiibo in the game.

Usage.description: Description of how the Amiibo is used.

write.description: Whether the Amiibo can be written to by this game.

amiiboSeries.description: Name of the Amiibo series this figure belongs to.

character.description: Name of the character represented by this Amiibo.

gameSeries.description: Name of the game series this Amiibo is associated with.

head.description: First 8 hex characters of the Amiibo ID.

tail.description: Last 8 hex characters of the Amiibo ID.

image.description: URL to the PNG image of the Amiibo figure.

imgwebp.description: URL to the WebP image of the Amiibo figure.

name.description: Display name of the Amiibo figure.

allOf.title: Amiibo Full
allOf.description: Amiibo with complete game compatibility and usage data.

gamesSwitch.description: Compatible Nintendo Switch games with usage info.

games3DS.description: Compatible Nintendo 3DS games with usage info.

gamesWiiU.description: Compatible Wii U games with usage info.

ReferenceItem.title: Reference Item
ReferenceItem.description: A reference data item with a hex key and human-readable name.

AmiiboListResponse.title: Amiibo List Response
AmiiboListResponse.description: Response envelope containing a list of Amiibo figures.

AmiiboFullListResponse.title: Amiibo Full List Response
AmiiboFullListResponse.description: Response envelope containing Amiibo figures with full game data.

ReferenceListResponse.title: Reference List Response
ReferenceListResponse.description: Response envelope containing a list of reference data items.

LastUpdatedResponse.title: Last Updated Response
LastUpdatedResponse.description: Response containing the last database update timestamp.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last database update.

ErrorResponse.title: Error Response
ErrorResponse.description: Error response returned for 4xx status codes.

examples: Not Found: The requested URL was not found on the server.
